meaning: n.照片,电影 一种图像文件扩展名
examples: The Mail runs a great back-page pic of Manu looking refreshed in training.
Put the word "Breath" as a screensaver or desktop pic, or put it up as a note on your wall, fridge, or your desk.
"Angels with Dirty Faces" is a Cagney gangster pic.
On the other hand, I would back anything that loosens the bonds of the bio-pic.
Photos take over the entire screen, with the profile pic situated in the lower middle.
